allow: Bash(node -e "const {GoogleGenAI} = require\(''@google/genai''\); const ai = new GoogleGenAI\({apiKey:''test''}\); console.log\(Object.keys\(ai.live || {}\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const {GoogleGenAI} = require\(''@google/genai''\); const ai = new GoogleGenAI\({apiKey:''test''}\); const proto = Object.getOwnPropertyNames\(Object.getPrototypeOf\(ai.live\)\); console.log\(proto\)")
